Tell Me Girl, Does This Sound Familiar? 🖐

You picked up your phone
and putting it down made you feel small.

But you know what the Bible says about your worth. You've heard the sermons. You have countless verses on sticky notes. Though somewhere between those mornings and Monday's scroll through Instagram, you just can't stop thinking about how good others have it.

This isn't a struggle with your faith. It's more of a struggle with the gap between what you believe and what you truly feel.

The Scroll That Steals

You open Instagram for five minutes and close it feeling way behind — in your career, your body, your relationships, your life (even though, you really aren't behind).

The Voice That Whispers

"Not enough." Not successful enough. Not beautiful enough. Not far enough along. That voice didn't start with social media — the gram just amplified it.

The Faith Gap

You do believe God made you with purpose. But comparison makes that truth feel vague — real on paper, distant in your chest.

The Truth God Has Already Spoken

Before you scrolled. Before you saw them win.
You were already chosen.

This is not a self-help journal. It is a 30-day walk through the truth that God settled your worth long before the world got to weigh in. Each day is built around scripture, honest reflection, and the kind of identity that does not shake when someone else shines.

Sis, you were not made to live someone else's life. You were made to live yours — with your specific gifts, your specific calling, and a peace that comparison has no power over.

"You did not choose me, but I chose you and appointed you so that you might go and bear fruit."

— John 15:16
Inside the Journal

Every page is a moment
to come back to yourself.

Thoughtfully designed so your quiet time feels like an invitation, not an obligation.

What Is Inside

30 Days of Honest,
Guided Transformation

01

An Anchor Verse Daily

All 30 Days
02
✍️

Guided Reflection

All 30 Days

90 Total Prompts
04

All 30 Days

"

The Journey

Four Parts. One Complete Transformation.

The journal is structured so each week builds on the last — moving you from awareness to identity to freedom.

1
Days 1–7

Recognising the Trap

Seeing comparison clearly for what it is — naming it, tracing where it came from, and understanding why it has had such a strong hold on you.

2
Days 8–14

Rooting Your Identity

Finding your worth in what cannot be taken. Your gifts, your calling, your identity in Christ — the foundation comparison cannot shake.

3
Days 15–21

Building Inner Contentment

Choosing peace as a daily practice. Redefining success on your own terms, healing comparison in relationships, and learning to celebrate others without losing yourself.

4
Days 22–30

Living Free

Carrying your worth into the world. Your unique assignment, your voice, your story — fully owned and fully lived without apology.

Your Investment

Everything you need.
Truly facing your greatest enemy — you.

Therapy helps. Coaching unlocks elements of you. This journal exposes you to you. If you let the Spirit lead, you will see just how beautiful you and your life have always been. We have narrowed 30 days of deep, faith-rooted transformation into one beautifully crafted PDF — and priced it so that no one has an excuse not to start.
